testcase.failure:
args = ['go', 'build', '-o', 'C:\\Users\\ryo-n\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\pytest-of-ryo-n\\pytest-3117\\test_docs_cli_json_outputs_mat0\\mem.exe', './cmd/mem']
def _run(args: list[str], *, cwd: Path, env: dict[str, str]) -> str: proc = subprocess.Popen( args, cwd=cwd, env=env, text=True, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.PIPE, **_process_group_kwargs(), ) try: > stdout, stderr = proc.communicate(timeout=180) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
C:\tmp\memx-resolver-v110-gate\tests\test_cli_schema_contract.py:58: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ ..\..\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\Lib\subprocess.py:1209: in communicate stdout, stderr = self._communicate(input, endtime, timeout) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <Popen: returncode: 1 args: ['go', 'build', '-o', 'C:\\Users\\ryo-n\\AppData...> input = None, endtime = 369010.968, orig_timeout = 180
def _communicate(self, input, endtime, orig_timeout): # Start reader threads feeding into a list hanging off of this # object, unless they've already been started. if self.stdout and not hasattr(self, "_stdout_buff"): self._stdout_buff = [] self.stdout_thread = \ threading.Thread(target=self._readerthread, args=(self.stdout, self._stdout_buff)) self.stdout_thread.daemon = True self.stdout_thread.start() if self.stderr and not hasattr(self, "_stderr_buff"): self._stderr_buff = [] self.stderr_thread = \ threading.Thread(target=self._readerthread, args=(self.stderr, self._stderr_buff)) self.stderr_thread.daemon = True self.stderr_thread.start()
if self.stdin: self._stdin_write(input)
# Wait for the reader threads, or time out. If we time out, the # threads remain reading and the fds left open in case the user # calls communicate again. if self.stdout is not None: self.stdout_thread.join(self._remaining_time(endtime)) if self.stdout_thread.is_alive(): > raise TimeoutExpired(self.args, orig_timeout) E subprocess.TimeoutExpired: Command '['go', 'build', '-o', 'C:\\Users\\ryo-n\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\pytest-of-ryo-n\\pytest-3117\\test_docs_cli_json_outputs_mat0\\mem.exe', './cmd/mem']' timed out after 180 seconds
..\..\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\Lib\subprocess.py:1630: TimeoutExpired
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception:
tmp_path = WindowsPath('C:/Users/ryo-n/AppData/Local/Temp/pytest-of-ryo-n/pytest-3117/test_docs_cli_json_outputs_mat0')
def test_docs_cli_json_outputs_match_schema(tmp_path: Path) -> None: schema = json.loads(CLI_SCHEMA_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8")) validator = Draft202012Validator(schema) > bin_path, env = _build_mem(tmp_path) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
C:\tmp\memx-resolver-v110-gate\tests\test_cli_schema_contract.py:156: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ C:\tmp\memx-resolver-v110-gate\tests\test_cli_schema_contract.py:84: in _build_mem _run(["go", "build", "-o", str(bin_path), "./cmd/mem"], cwd=GO_ROOT, env=env) _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
args = ['go', 'build', '-o', 'C:\\Users\\ryo-n\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\pytest-of-ryo-n\\pytest-3117\\test_docs_cli_json_outputs_mat0\\mem.exe', './cmd/mem']
def _run(args: list[str], *, cwd: Path, env: dict[str, str]) -> str: proc = subprocess.Popen( args, cwd=cwd, env=env, text=True, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.PIPE, **_process_group_kwargs(), ) try: stdout, stderr = proc.communicate(timeout=180) except subprocess.TimeoutExpired as exc: _terminate_process_tree(proc) stdout, stderr = proc.communicate() > raise AssertionError(f"command timed out after 180s: {' '.join(args)}; stdout: {stdout}; stderr: {stderr}") from exc E AssertionError: command timed out after 180s: go build -o C:\Users\ryo-n\AppData\Local\Temp\pytest-of-ryo-n\pytest-3117\test_docs_cli_json_outputs_mat0\mem.exe ./cmd/mem; stdout: ; stderr:

testcase.name: test_ack_docs_rejects_symlink_escape

skipped.message: symlinks are unavailable: [WinError 1314] クライアントは要求された特権を保有していません。: 'C:\\Users\\ryo-n\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\pytest-of-ryo-n\\pytest-3117\\test_ack_docs_rejects_symlink_0\\outside.md' -> 'C:\\Users\\ryo-n\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\pytest-of-ryo-n\\pytest-3117\\test_ack_docs_rejects_symlink_0\\repo\\escape.md'

testcase.name: test_receipt_store_upsert_is_concurrency_safe

failure.message: PermissionError: [WinError 5] アクセスが拒否されました。: 'C:\\Users\\ryo-n\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\pytest-of-ryo-n\\pytest-3117\\test_receipt_store_upsert_is_c0\\repo\\.workflow-cache\\.concurrent.json.0oy0l6vk.tmp' -> 'C:\\Users\\ryo-n\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\pytest-of-ryo-n\\pytest-3117\\test_receipt_store_upsert_is_c0\\repo\\.workflow-cache\\concurrent.json'

testcase.failure:
tmp_path = WindowsPath('C:/Users/ryo-n/AppData/Local/Temp/pytest-of-ryo-n/pytest-3117/test_receipt_store_upsert_is_c0')
def test_receipt_store_upsert_is_concurrency_safe(tmp_path: Path) -> None: repo_root = tmp_path / "repo" repo_root.mkdir() store = JsonReceiptStore(path=".workflow-cache/concurrent.json") records = [ {"task_id": "TASK.concurrent", "doc_id": f"docs/{index}.md", "version": str(index)} for index in range(20) ]
with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=8) as executor: > list( executor.map( lambda record: store.upsert(repo_root=repo_root, records=[record]), records, ) )
C:\tmp\memx-resolver-v110-gate\tests\test_workflow_plugin.py:250: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ ..\..\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\Lib\concurrent\futures\_base.py:619: in result_iterator yield _result_or_cancel(fs.pop()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ..\..\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\Lib\concurrent\futures\_base.py:317: in _result_or_cancel return fut.result(timeout) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ..\..\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\Lib\concurrent\futures\_base.py:456: in result return self.__get_result() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ..\..\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\Lib\concurrent\futures\_base.py:401: in __get_result raise self._exception ..\..\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\Lib\concurrent\futures\thread.py:58: in run result = self.fn(*self.args, **self.kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\tmp\memx-resolver-v110-gate\tests\test_workflow_plugin.py:252: in <lambda> lambda record: store.upsert(repo_root=repo_root, records=[record]), ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\tmp\memx-resolver-v110-gate\memx_resolver_workflow_plugin\store.py:130: in upsert _atomic_write_json(path, receipts) _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
path = WindowsPath('C:/Users/ryo-n/AppData/Local/Temp/pytest-of-ryo-n/pytest-3117/test_receipt_store_upsert_is_c0/repo/.workflow-cache/concurrent.json') payload = [{'doc_id': 'docs/1.md', 'task_id': 'TASK.concurrent', 'version': '1'}, {'doc_id': 'docs/2.md', 'task_id': 'TASK.concu..., 'task_id': 'TASK.concurrent', 'version': '4'}, {'doc_id': 'docs/0.md', 'task_id': 'TASK.concurrent', 'version': '0'}]
def _atomic_write_json(path: Path, payload: Any) -> None: path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) temporary: Path | None = None try: with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile( mode="w", encoding="utf-8", newline="\n", dir=path.parent, prefix=f".{path.name}.", suffix=".tmp", delete=False, ) as handle: temporary = Path(handle.name) json.dump(payload, handle, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) handle.write("\n") handle.flush() os.fsync(handle.fileno()) > os.replace(temporary, path) E PermissionError: [WinError 5] アクセスが拒否されました。: 'C:\\Users\\ryo-n\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\pytest-of-ryo-n\\pytest-3117\\test_receipt_store_upsert_is_c0\\repo\\.workflow-cache\\.concurrent.json.0oy0l6vk.tmp' -> 'C:\\Users\\ryo-n\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\pytest-of-ryo-n\\pytest-3117\\test_receipt_store_upsert_is_c0\\repo\\.workflow-cache\\concurrent.json'
C:\tmp\memx-resolver-v110-gate\memx_resolver_workflow_plugin\store.py:67: PermissionError
